name: Hunter.io
description: Hunter.io is an email intelligence platform that finds and verifies professional email addresses. It provides domain-level email discovery, individual email finding, email verification, and enrichment services for sales, recruiting, and security investigations.

actions.name: Domain Search
actions.description: Find all email addresses associated with a domain. Returns email patterns, individual addresses with confidence scores, department, seniority, and sources where the emails were found.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: The domain name to search for email addresses (e.g., 'example.com')

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of email addresses to return (default: 10)

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of email addresses to skip for pagination

actions.name: Email Finder
actions.description: Find the most likely email address for a person given their name and company domain. Returns the email with a confidence score and verification status.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: The domain name of the company

parameters.name: full_name
parameters.description: The person's full name (alternative to first_name + last_name)

parameters.name: max_duration
parameters.description: Maximum duration for the request in seconds (3-20, default: 10)

actions.name: Email Verifier
actions.description: Verify the deliverability of an email address. Returns verification status (valid, invalid, accept_all, webmail, disposable, unknown), SMTP check results, and MX record data.

actions.name: Email Count
actions.description: Get the total number of email addresses found for a domain without consuming API credits. Returns counts broken down by type (personal vs. generic).

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: The domain name to get email count for

actions.name: Account Info
actions.description: Retrieve information about the Hunter.io account including remaining credits, plan details, and usage statistics.
